title: Moving property across highways
doc_html:
§343.  Moving property across highways

The chief engineer of the Department of Transportation and Development may regulate, as to method, the moving of tangible movable property across the highways.  

Amended by Acts 1977, No. 291, §1; Acts 1992, No. 350, §1.
doc_text:
§343.  Moving property across highways
The chief engineer of the Department of Transportation and Development may regulate, as to method, the moving of tangible movable property across the highways.
Amended by Acts 1977, No. 291, §1; Acts 1992, No. 350, §1.
